missing_main_functions: Account Deletion or Cleanup (e.g., user can delete account, which may affect email uniqueness)
Password Reset Flow (if applicable, though not explicitly required, it is a common adjacent function)
missing_sub_functions: Email Verification Expiration Handling (e.g., token expiry, re-verification after expiry)
Email Verification Link/Code Invalid or Tampered Cases
Concurrent Registration Attempts with Same Email (race condition)
Password Storage and Handling (e.g., hashing, not plain text, though assumed plain text in assumptions)

unclear_categories.reason: The test intent mentions 'case sensitivity, leading/trailing spaces, and Unicode normalization' but the requirement does not specify how email uniqueness is enforced (case-sensitive or not). This category may be based on an assumption not confirmed by the business rules.
The requirement does not specify a 'resend verification email' feature. This category assumes functionality not confirmed in the requirements.

recommendations: Clarify with product owner whether email uniqueness is case-sensitive or case-insensitive before testing edge cases like case sensitivity.
Confirm if a 'resend verification email' feature is part of the requirements; if not, remove or mark as exploratory.
Add a sub-function for email verification token expiration and invalid token handling, as these are common risks.
Consider adding a sub-function for race condition testing (concurrent duplicate email registration) to ensure data integrity.
Review the assumption that password is accepted as plain text; if not, add a sub-function for password hashing and storage validation.
Add a main function for 'Account Management' if future requirements include account deletion or password reset.
